Jabil took over $INTC pluggable lines and is positioned as more scalable than $AAOI's capex-heavy laser-fab approach: if $SIVE + diverse fabs (Win Semi + others) supply lasers and $JBL handles final assembly, that creates an Innolight-style vertically-integrated setup with already-validated hyperscaler relationships and US-production premiums. Potential 40% re-rating by H1 2027.
